sizing_rule.note: Position size derived from optimal f calculation: contracts = Total Equity / (Maximum Loss / optimal_f). Example: $50,000 equity / ($5,000 max loss / 1) = 1 contract per $21,000 equity when f=1. Based on worst-case loss scenario and historical HPR analysis per Vince methodology.

source_rule_text: Position size should be calculated as 1 contract per $21,000 in equity when optimal f equals 1, based on the worst-case loss scenario and HPR calculations.
